Home / Services / Bathroom Remodeling

Bathroom Remodeling

Create a spa-like retreat in your own home.

Transform your outdated bathroom into a luxurious and functional space with Wonderwoman Construction. We specialize in bathroom remodeling projects of all sizes, from simple cosmetic updates to complete renovations. Whether you're looking to upgrade your fixtures, install a new shower or tub, or create a more accessible and comfortable space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

We understand the challenges of remodeling bathrooms in older Minneapolis homes, including dealing with limited space, outdated plumbing, and moisture issues. We're skilled at maximizing space efficiency and incorporating modern amenities while preserving the character of your home. We also use high-quality, moisture-resistant materials to ensure the longevity of your bathroom remodel. We are experienced working in bungalows and two-story homes in Uptown and Southwest Minneapolis.

Our team will guide you through every step of the remodeling process, from design and material selection to installation and finishing touches. We'll work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, ensuring that your new bathroom is both beautiful and functional.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation & Space Planning
  2. 02 Step 2: Fixture & Material Selection
  3. 03 Step 3: Demolition & Plumbing/Electrical Updates
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation & Finishing

Benefits

  • Improved Home Comfort
  • Increased Home Value
  • Enhanced Functionality
  • Modernized Aesthetics

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of flooring is best for a bathroom remodel?

Tile is a popular choice for bathroom flooring due to its water resistance, durability, and wide variety of styles. We can help you choose the perfect tile for your project.

Can you install a walk-in shower?

Yes, we can install a walk-in shower as part of your bathroom remodel. We'll ensure it meets accessibility standards and your specific needs.

How much does a bathroom remodel typically cost?

The cost of a bathroom remodel depends on the scope of the project and the materials you choose. We'll provide a detailed estimate after our initial consultation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with bathroom remodeling? Contact us today.
